Full_Review: Couple of more days there We loved it  Very comfy beds very polite staff rooms have everything you need computer television radio iron hair dyer fresh towels every morning and sky lounge is perfect place to start your night out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I stayed at the property for 2 nights On both nights I was woken up by staff The first night was at 2 30am the second at 9 00am by staff wanting to get plates from night before s room service  The room was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room 902 stainless steel threshold between bathroom and room Extremely dangerous and slippery I fell over And smashed my head twice   Mini Dutch pancakes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Staff were unhelpful rooms were bog standard beds were uncomfortable location was Rubbish they asked 22 50 for a small breakfast drinks were very expensive the whole hotel was not worth the money  Would never go back to this hotel it was terrible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: When we arrived we were told that we had to pay an extra 100 deposit if we used anything like the mini bar the price would come out of that thankfully we received the full deposit at the end of the stay However this was not stated during the confirmation of the booking so be careful   The location of the hotel was good and the bed was comfy and extra dressing gowns were an added bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I wanted to stay near the top of the hotel for the view however during the night between 1 5am there was always a lot of noise coming from above us like dragging tables chairs etc that s the only fault I had with the stay and would just stay a few floors lower   After walking around for hours every day the bed was so comfy to chill in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Quite impersonel long reaction time of the staff when an issue is reported no TV available one of the nights I spent there   The view and location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms and halls were quite bare they could have been decorated more nicely  Been was extremely comfortable and I loved the warm welcome cookie we revived when checking in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: This is a huge hotel with hundreds if not thousands of rooms which has natural consequences and should be taken into account by people desiring a more intimate experience While I loved it some may be put off by the sheer scale of the establishment   Basically everything is great about this hotel The location is extremely convenient within a short walk from the Central Station and a number of sights with great public transport The rooms are spacious and clean and the staff unfaillingly courteous and helpful All in all a great stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The view was terrible from the room as we faced a wall The room was underwhelming for the price the location was alright but a little removed as we are avid travellers I was not super impressed I think there were better options in town   The room was pretty clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the hotel is very modern and the staff are really friendly the skylounge has incredible views and a great atmosphere the rooms are really modern and have a imac

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Drinks in skyline bar were very expensive Breakfast was disappointing as they were always running out of popular items and staff did not stock up so the choice was limited given the cost of the breakfast I would ve expected everything to be replenished promptly   Location and cleanliness of hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: What a beautiful location the walk through to dam square from hotel was luvly lots of shops and places to eat it was light festival while we was ther so as our hotel was faces the canal we got to see all the gorjes lights as we would stroll in and out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: My room was poorly sound proofed and could not sleep was so bad Very cold in room and heating did not work like a 3rd world hotel Blankets were thin for summer yet its 6 outside   location and look of place is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room view could have been better My partner told staff we had planned to get engaged did nothing special for us No upgrade offered which he was going to pay for   Handy to city centre

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Cost of breakfast rooms are a bit small for the price not thrilled about the 20 inch television that doubles as a computer a larger flat panel Television in the room would have made the trip more enjoyable  Breakfast fitness center general location nice Starbucks attached to hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The lotion shampoo etc is in hopeless botles difficult to empty and there were missing parts e g shampoo which I did not realise before I needed it It is really difficult to get the sink to empty I learned how from the reception but had to open it again after every cleaning Leave it open   The view over the harbour The snacks at the conference Coffe Tea at the room Breakfast is lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Incredible That s how I feel about that city when it lays right here in a view from my window Simply clever interior of apartments but pretty feel about architecture breakfasts and smiles everywhere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hotel room is functional not luxurious type Toilet is also hostel like My room view is great facing the city I was asking some question to the front office staff and after 5 min this lady staff kinda raised her voice which is unexpected   You can t beat the location 5 min to the central station and walking through the Starbucks will save you from the cold winter The sky lounge is good place to chill

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room too small nearly Japanese standard We couldn t find The Kettle as it was in a drawer of the desk Fridge was empty Ice dispenser located in the corridor in Amsterdam is useless Breakfast at 25 is too much expensive  Starbucks in the building where we could have breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Somethimes we can hear noise from railways byt it was not loud and for a few minutes   Location is perfect near to old town and city center employees at reception desk is friendly and try to do every request from guests Room was quite big for simple room for 2 view was on railways

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very noisy room we got on 10th floor someone was making a disco or something no respect for the others they changed the room afterwords   I like the view from the hotel Very central quiet room professional staff Anouk duty manager

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: One thing I didn t like was that when I arrived the price I paid was more than what stayed on booking com Also the price I thought I was meant to pay said it included state tax on checkout I was then asked to pay another 36 for state tax Was really not impressed and just felt they were asking for more and more money than what I assumed I was paying   Loved the location of the hotel staff and cleanliness off hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Didn t know about on site parking therefor we parked on the p r parking outside the city   Great bread for breakfast Location was great Pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I already informed the property I ll arrive early morning so I expected the check in would be before 12 since I arrived the hotel 7 30 a m they let me check in around 14 00   The location is fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Not being told upon checking in that breakfast was included rental bikes were available etc would have been more useful to us to have been given a small overview   Bed was super comfy views were incredible didn t get chance to sample breakfast but we will be booking again so I ll be sure to get in on the act then

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing not to like  I thought we booked with Breakfast however it wasn t so we ate out at 25 euros for breakfast is pricey especially for Amsterdam The rooms are a good size great shower and perfect location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: staff couldn t find my reservation because supposedly it was booked using my middle name even though i haven t used my middle name in years   Lovely place just as you come out the station its there on your left Lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Only regret I didn t ask for more popcorn sky bar   Great location Sky bar cocktails were amazing I recommend sky tai Don t mention the popcorn TO DIE FOR Eastwood is a lovely restaurant The steak knives presentation is fun They gave me the requested room with canal view Can t wait to revisit

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room was small no window to open air con dry the mouth off me when I was sleeping also we must of been under the sky bar caus I could hear things drop an chairs moving some of the night   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I wish it had a pool The beakfast was less than our expectations but still good   There was a two hour free drink snd snack time in the evening which was great and generous The room size was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I had purchased a room which wasn t the basic yet it felt very basic It was not worth the money the view was amazing but the windows very dirty   View was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The staff really worked hard at making my stay pleasant and they are always cheerful Where the room is concerned I particularly enjoyed the super strong shower and they have one of the most comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Had to pay a deposit that we knew nothing about this then cut into our budget for our holiday therefore having to change plans  Location staff were fairly helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Found the room hugely uncomfotable very small bed was worst we have ever slept on quilt too small for the size of the bed literally room does not have a television meaning you cannot actually spend any relaxing time in the room instead you are supplied with a mac computer with around 5 English channels and internet access which does not support any video format like Netflix etc which would of been a understanding consolation room was not supplied with any water bottles and hotel charged 17 00 for two SMALL bottles we chose this hotel as we expected to be able to spend some time in the room relaxing so was very disappointed hotel also charges an additional 150 00 on arrival without warning will definatly be finding another place to stay when we visit amsterdam again   Location determines the price Amsterdam beautiful place brilliant friendly people

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The reservation price through Booking com was not honored by the hotel After extensive discussions between Booking com and the hotel management I gave up and paid the higher rate I paid an extra 300euro

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Our experience at the sky lounge was awful we were made to feel unwelcome waited over 30 minutes for one drink which I had to resolve myself by going to the bar supervisor we were dealt with in am offhand manner by a female member if staff whilst other customers around us were served quickly very disappointed as this was why we chose the hotel on recommendations from friends and family  The reception staff were exemplary

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We stored our bags in the hotel after check out as we had a few hours before flying then when we come to collect them we had to wait nearly half an hour for them to find them  Location was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Far too expensive for a small room with a small and uncomfortable bed Did not get a good nights sleep Room not cleaned properly before our stay and so previous guest s receipt was left behind Found that previous guest had paid 85 euro a night and we were paying 329 euros a night for the same room on the same day they had checked out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Hope the room will be cleaned and the shampoo conditioner soap be replenished we stayed for 3 days and not once the room was cleaned and supplies replaced   The location is nice very close to the train station and tourist areas The breakfast buffet is also good Just a little pricey if not included in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I asked for a quiet room which was great and really quiet However the view from my room wasn t great That didn t matter I d rather have a good nights sleep The view from the sky lounge more than made up for it   Warm cookie on arrival free apples and water in reception Apple Mac in room staff always happy to help good location clean I ve included a pic looking at the hotel over the bridge at night It really is lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the views window wasn t very good i expected a lot better the 11th floor sky lounge in the evening was a horrible place to be basically all the reasons i booked the hotel for dissapointed me but it was clean and friendly enough   the staff where very polite which to me is the most important thing the travelling the last thing i want after flying is to be faced with someone that doesnt want to help all the staff where very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet was over priced at 25 50pp However there are alternatives available   Rooms were warm decent size and very clean with comfy beds Staff friendly and attentive Wide variety of restaurants within the hotel itself and great location in the city Free bottles of water and cookies cakes at reception every day

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We were staying during New Year and were not aware of the amount of people who would be in the hotel We were awake until 4am due to music in the SkyLounge  When we arrived we received fresh hot cookies which was an added bonus The staff were very helpful The location cannot be faulted

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I wasn t advised that the payment for 2 rooms would automatically come from my card I had withdrawn the cash and changed into euros to make this payment in advance I was extremely displeased that what booking com advised and what the hotel were claiming were completely different  The sky bar location on the rooftop was truly amazing I would recommend this hotel purely based on that alone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: CROWDED BREAKFAST DIFFICULT TO SETTLE   FANTASTIC LOCATION FEW STEPS NEXT TO CENTRAL STATION SITUATED ON THE RIVER ROOMS WITH FRONT VIEW ARE AMAZING BE CAREFUL OF UPGRADE CHARGE ITS PER ROOM AND NOT PER PERSON FRIENDLY STAFF

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I asked for bottle of Prosecco in our room on arrival to surprise my partner and they didn t do it Also the view of the railway lines were great cheers for that city view I was promised   Executive Lounge was really good I ll have this included in my booking every time I return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Smoking rooms r not garuanteed Not flexible for one free upgrade to lease a first comer  Closest 4 hotel to central station Very tasty hot cookie at check in and whenever

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: new years eve party a shambles no preference for hotel guests who have paid heftily for staying there open to public for free who fill it from 4pm  location room overlooking city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room very small felt like we were continually moving the table chair and our suitcases to get around Exec Lounge was also very small for number of people using it between 6 8pm   Staff excellent new year show great restaurant dinner and breakfast delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The smell of cigarettes in the corridor on the 9th floor  The kind staff The typical Hilton chocolate cookie at our arrival The very clean bad room The location of the hotel Free water and apples in the lobby The fitness room spacious and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: No bath Toiletries were inferior to those advertised Room was smaller than I expected   Good choice of food generous portions Clean well functioning rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The Sky lounge was overly packed I didn t want to wait so I didn t eat or drink anything there   I liked the appetizers and drinks in the executive lounge I had a great view from room 808

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I asked for room on the 4th floor in email and didn t get it   The location is perfect Have stayed here 3 times already and would stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The staff in the sky lounge could have been more interested in their approach to service we sat for 10 mins waiting to order drinks before leaving and going down stairs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Good clean confortable and beautiful room Sky Bar Great Modern and new build Team Best Lovely People Good gym Great place to stay Just few steps to central station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We ordered room service on the first night and was told it would be half an hour An hour later it still hasn t come so I phoned back up and was told it was on its way Another hour passed and I was about to fall asleep so I phoned up to cancel it I was then told by a polite female we could get breakfast free of charge due to it being late at night we woke up and it was to late to take advantage of this offer Also on the first night we went up to sky lounger in which I was told to take a seat and we would get table service again we waited half an hour before someone took our order and waited another half hour before the drinks came out in which we was also short changed by a couple Of euros I always leave a tip but don t expect someone to take it before we give it We then left and didn t wish to spend time in the hotel other than to sleep at night This morning someone entered our room at 9am whilst we was sleeping so I asked for them to leave and didn t appreciate being woken up when we didn t have to leave until 12noon So to conclude I chose your hotel to make our time away more special but was not made to feel welcome due to all of the above   The room was very nice and location was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: room is very small i expected a more spacius room and shower when we arrived the room was dusty and looked unclean balcony was much worse with tons of cigarete buds that wasnts cleaned also during our 2 nights stay we had our coffee on the balcony and left the cups on the table when we came back to the room later after it has been cleaned the coffee cups were still there so probably they are not cleaning the balcony at all we collected some garbage and put it on the floor next to the door in a bag and it also remained there after the room has been cleaned also the water pressure in the shower was very poor expected so much more from a hiltom operated hotel   view from executive room with balcony was amazing sky lounge although expensive is a must executive lounge was also very nice place to come and relax

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We stayed in room 746 and the lift was far away from our room on our last day we could hardly walk the corridor because we had walked that much around Amsterdam our legs were hurting  The view out of our bedroom window the hotel was very modern with djs as you walk in and the sky lounge was good too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room was on 10th floor under the sky bar We could constantly hear music and high heels walking up and down This went on until 2 3am in the morning The heating didn t work into our room and the lock on the door was hanging off   Staff were nice and rooms were clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Cost of drinks in the skylounge  Location Cleanliness and good breakfast choices Also attention to detail like the little signs advising where things were located

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Weather was cold however wasn t the hotel s fault   Welcomed with warm chocolate cookies my 11 year old son loved it Great location about 400m from the train station Easy access to trams so getting around was a breeze

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Hotel bar was expensive Their breakfast was 25 euros   Really nice clean and friendly hotel Room was very quiet and well laid out Mac in the room means I could do internet stuff All great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the room for what we payed was very small over looked and was cold unsure I the heating was working  the hotel and staff was amazing very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The bedroom was a bit cool at night and the heating system did nothing to help Would have loved a spare blanket However this did nothing to dampen our enthusiasm we loved the place and will be back   The staff were exceptional nothing was too much to ask of them

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It was perfect   Arrived at 7 30am had previously emailed to ask if poa Sible to have earlier check in time which they did Lovely warm copley upon arrival Location was perfect walk to every where and right beside trams and trains too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The only slight negative for me was that the view out of the window was of train tracks   The staff were extremely helpful if you needed anything from a bottle of water to toothpaste mouthwash it was there within minutes without any extra cost

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: they do not take into consideration your notes on booking com forms such as you ask for double bed or room that looks trough sea you get the opposite   away from city rush but very close to every where

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Could have done with a hairdryer in the room But it wasn t too much of a bad hair day   lucky to get a room on the 11th floor with a view on the IJ Wonderful Bed was also extremely comfortable The sky lounge is amazing the staff brilliant and the bloody Marys and lunch salads fantastic Photos of view from the sky lounge and the Ij have been included I have put the Sky Lounge on my list of where to lunch and have a breather when spending a day in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Only good for buisness gusts Not for families Next to the rail tracks from north side Furnitur can be improved Relatively samel rooms Forced daily to keep all my personal items in the safe box because Hotel can not find my lost medical pillow   Close to central train station shopping areas Starbux next door Good breakfast food and place Building clear from any jamed areas

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Can be expensive to stay at certain times of the year  Staff very pleasant asked for 2 extra pillows and they were sent up and at your room within 10mins Great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: A bit expensive for service provided Heating was not enough   Great Location Perfect breakfast with s variety of choice Good coffee Internet was very quick

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: At check in we got a bit of fuss for booking with booking com I am a Hilton Honors member Gold level My spouse was attending an academic conference so when he had to book it made the most sense for his needs When I decided to go along I did not go expecting to collect a bunch of points or anything but being recognized as a loyal customer would have been nice and not calling so much attention to fact we were really missing out on a lot of points as a result of not using hilton com   When we asked staff something 9 out of 10 went out of their way to answer or assist We asked for a lot of help when we arrived and they really were nice about it I normally check in and never ask for much We had connectivity issues with the wifi and it was a wild goose chase but they persisted and came back when things still were not resolved They were all helpful and cheerful and I was quite flustered trying to get online to attend a meeting with my office We asked for some advice on restaurants or asked them to make a reservation for one we wanted to try They were very helpful The food and beverage we had were very good Also we had access to the Executive Lounge This was a great option for us because we stayed for 9 nights We could have a nice place to sit and relax and at other times enjoy refreshments The hotel location was optimal we arrived at Centraal Station and easily made the walk over to the hotel with our luggage The Sky Lounge has a gorgeous view it is worth going up for a look it does get quite crowded up there Enjoyed food and drink and looking out the window there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Didn t take breakfast because of the expensive cost   Room was very comfortable and the location of the hotel was very good as it was within walking distance of Amsterdam Centraal Train station and other transport links such as canal boat trips Sky Bar gave a spectacular view of city lovely place to have a late drink

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: That they reserve 150 00 Euro deposit extra from the rate and till now i don t get them back from 14 10 2016 please inform me about it when i will receive it back thanks Salem Hanania  the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The reception staff very poor experince very long time on check on and out They could not manage to give the invoice after 40 minutes minutes I have the invoice written upside down

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms were quite ordinary we thought During our last stay at Double Tree in London we felt the rooms were more spacious and stylish   The staff were excellent helpful polite and proactive The facilities and location were also good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: TVs reception kept failing on the Apple computer Only paper cups provided for tea and coffee   Beds were comfy linen was good and the Skylounge food and atmosphere were fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: See above   We liked the location and the surrounding environment We could compare for instance the badroom facilities with other much cheaper 3 4 stars hotels in Tokyo HongKong etc and we were disappointed We expected better from Hilton

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing this hotel will be my first choice next time i am in Amsterdam   Everything about our stay at this hotel was tip top its just around the corner from the central station the reception staff were very kind the room was just great and the roof top bar was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Storage of bags and reclaim luggage 3 different locations to find bags need more supervised staff for the price hotel unsatisfactory i wouldn t call this a 5 star   Position to city breakfast good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: toilet did t flush well breakfast was ok but not great for 25 euro each It was very busy and we cleaned our own table after a while also the coffee mashine was asking for maintenance but passing staff didn t care have seen better considering the pricing of the hotel   the location is perfect if you want to be in the centre of Amsterdam but also the rest of the country considering the railway station is very close

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room 967 has a toilet that s difficult to flush and I was disturbed by bumping and dragging during the night   Staff were all super friendly check in guest services breakfast Keen to help even on small issues

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We asked for room With nice view but receptionist didn t even listen to us and just put us at the back of the hotel If she had just acknowledged the fact that maybe there was no rooms available at the front we would have totally understood  Lovely breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: strong odour in room chemical not properly attended to during entire stay given a spray bottle of lightly perfumed water Thats all that was done even after several days of telephoning   Staff very keen to make up for shortcomings of the hotel beyond their control bless em They compensate with free museum tickets and complimentary biscuits Bravo team

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Expensive  Great location close to central station Nice facility amazing breakfast with any kind of food including sushi and champagne Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The skybar had a Saturday night queue covering the whole elevator area making it near impossible to exit enter elevators let alone the skybar Hotel guests should have priority access separate entrance to the skybar   Great location to get to from the airport couldn t have been smoother Good vantage point to see the city as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Prior to our arrival I asked if the hotel could do something special for my best friend as it was her birthday and was told something could be arranged but upon arrival and getting to our room nothing was done Never the less this didn t stop us having a good time I just wanted her to feel special   I like the location of the hotel It made it easy for me and my friend to navigate our selves around a city we have never been to before

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Hotel room card kept deactivating and had problems with toilet flushing   An excellent hotel cannot fault doubletree Very clean and staff were very nice Room was comfortable and Restraunt bar food was perfect Sky lounge was very nice with a lovely view Location was also perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Check in arrangements were slow and confusing but I fed this back to the hotel and they sent me a lovely card and said they d sort this straightaway Can t ask for more than that   Friendly staff comfortable hotel good breakfast selection great location but do go by train not taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The site it s perfect to reach city center and the room was tidy and clean It s expensive as many hotel of this category in Amsterdam but everything was perfect and Skylounge at the top of the bulging was breathtaking

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Our view was of the train tracks and the hotel entrance seemed a little sketchy  The hotel was in a good location in reference to the city I thought that parking should be included as the hotel is a nice one even if they just charged more the rooms were clean they had a nice restaurant and the staff was friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Housekeeping woke us up on sunday morning by coming into room three times   Location was good the bed was large and very comfy apple TV with Internet access was nice extra Enjoyed the warm chocolate cookie on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room wasn t so large for a Deluxe King but it served it s purpose   The location is perfect close to central train station and lots of local attractions The Sky Lounge is a great place for snacks and drinks while overlooking the wonderful scenery of Amsterdam Central This is the only place I stay when I go to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hotel did not repsond to my request for early check in before arrival and when we arrived i waited a few hours before i was offered an upgrade with an extra 30 euro to be able to rest after a long night flight The presentation of dinner was great the first day but when we went teh next day the waiter had changed and the service was not as good   location was convenient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: In a twin room which was ok but the beds were very tiny and the mattresses were rather hard but that s a personal thing   Everything The reception staff were first class The Eastwood staff were exceptional and the food was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The beds were a little small and the skylounge can be heard even five floors down We informed the hotel we would be early arrivals We left our luggage at reception and the staff said to call back at lunchtime as they would try to make sure our room was ready given the early start Came back at 1 30 and was abruptly told that check in is at three Explained previous conversation and she repeated check in is at three   Sky lounge is fabulous location is spot on Skip breakfast as there are better cheaper alternatives on the doorstep Most of the staff are super helpful and enthusiastic about helping you chose were to go and what to do The cookies on arrival are scrummy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  They are so nice and give free water and apples and my room with balcony was amazing The sky lounge and lobby lounge have great food and drinks not to mention the atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Paying 25 Euro for a few baloons a birthday sign and 2 pieces of cheesecake No flowers   Issue with our room which they changed immediately upon our request

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room is awesome clean stunning view good to have a computer available in the room the staff is great and the facilities are great The location is a major bonos

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I absolutely hate giving bad feedbacks but this time I have to Arrived to the hotel at the night Received a room with broken shower Asked to fix it got an answer they will be able to do this only next day But until then I can go and take a shower in another room So I asked them to move me into the room with working shower they said they can t as it was BOOKED Further revealed it was a lux So I got a permission to walk around hotel in underwear and took a shower in lux two times lucky meee Sorry folks this is absolutely not a level of Hilton hotel or any other for such money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: shower very poor for an executive room and quite small compared to Hilton at Gatwick did not get into room until nearly 5pm and when asked for a late check out was not possible as they had conferences going on Need to care about normal clients not corporate as we spend our money also   executive lounge was good good variety of breakfast staff excellent Sky lounge was superb excellent location You need somewhere to put your jumpers and trousers Good having a safe

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Check In The lady at the reception said she could not trace our booking which we made through Booking com She gave us back our passports and vanished

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I really can t think of anything   The choice at breakfast was fabulous The staff were very helpful and friendly The room was clean and comfortable The hotel itself is in an excellent location beside the station and other amenities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Excellent staff A new member of staff called Cindy booked me in she was brand aware very helpful thoughtful and demonstrated a high level professionalism and customer service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Air con on coolest and highest fan and it was still too warm The holder for the shower gel which was metal fell off the wall onto my foot whilst trying t get shower gel out   View was beautiful overlooking the harbour

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: maintenance team starts working early morning by 7 am with high sound pollution while amsterdam has night life up to 1 am wanted to sleep more  staff and location were very good sky lounge was beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Rooms are tiny dusty poorly furnished tiny bathroom with standing shower poor drainage in sink and shower tv is an apple computer wifi too slow to stream rooms with view really mean rooms with view to other hotel room Towels and bathrobes were so hard Minibar was completely empty The Skylounge has incredible views but is super overpriced for what you get and we can say that because we don t mind spending for quality This hotel is so incredibly overpriced and not worthy of 4 stars at all You only pay for location which is perfect for short stay travelers right at the train station and 5 minutes walk to the city center Do not pay for a luxurious place to stay pay if you need a convenient location for your trip   Location Staff Skylounge view not the food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: dispensers for shampoo conditioner and body lotion very difficlut to use could have used plyers to help squeeze out contents   great executive lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I choose because I a Honors member and then you tell me because I booked a certain way I don t get them How was I suppose to know that I doubt I ll bother again   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms are dark small with no central wall TV reading lights or good room lightning The rate is very high for the room The beds were uncomfortable The long hallways are very confusing once you leave the elevator The breakfast is super expensive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: None that I could recall  Location to train station cruise port and city for site seeing Should be rated higher Food at breakfast was excellent with a wide variety and eggs cooked the way you wanted them Room was cleaned on time and the hotel in general was very clean Over all our stay was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I didn t have much good sleep from the flat pillows Hotel should offer more pillow choices   The room facility are clean and well maintained Location is great few minutes walk fron Central Station And welcome warm chocolate cookie is a very cute gimmick

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Request for Harbour View was ignored for first night of stay but we were changed to a Harbour View for second night  Sky Bar had great views and prices were very reasonable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Hotel could do with more art work in both the corridors and bedrooms Furniture in room pretty basic and had the odd chip Would have expected better from a Hilton Hotel Although these are only minor issues   Staff were friendly and attentive Bathroom was clean although ours only had a shower so you may want to check if you like to have a bath Hotel is in a good location close to Main train station Overall glad we chose this hotel as some of the others in the city looked very shabby albeit I could only see the outside of them

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  The Doubletree is a modern spotlessly clean ideally located hotel next to Central Station in Amsterdam It is the outstanding staff however which makes this hotel exceptional My sister had an unfortunate fall the first day of our vacation at the Doubletree and the staff could not have been more attentive helpful and considerate They went above and beyond to secure medical and dental care for her and to ensure our comfort throughout our pre cruise stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The plug sockets went off both nights during our stay so had to call down to reception at 2 30am to sort it out Stay at the front also as the Train Station is at the back   A free warm Cookie on arival was nice Pillows were comfy Good location handy for the Trains Trams

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hallways were very lengthy and winding It might be easy for someone to get lost after a few beverages because they all lead back to only one set of elevators   The staff that we dealt with were very helpful and polite The gym was super cute but effective enough Had more dumbbells than most hotel gyms The warm cookie on arrival is just delicious Especially when the delightful lady at the front desk gave me another one the next day The sky lounge was gorgeous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room is a bit small Parking entrance is a bit far near the end of the street and not easy to find when you first time arrived but not a problem later and the price is pretty reasonable 13 Euros for 24 hours   Great location with easy parking place at 1 Helpful staff Breakfast is good with some Chinese and Japanese food on top of the traditional continental breakfast Nice view on the sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the bathroom wasn t very clean the toilet was dirty on the inside dirty tiles the hotel hallways smell old and like somebody smoked there the carpet in the room smelled like piss and there wasn t a window in the room to get some fresh air a mini bar would have been nice   great check in the staff is very nice great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Could improve on cleanliness of the rooms   Close to Central station tram n bus lines Coin operated laundery within 10 mts walking Choice of restaurants around the vicinity

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: As we drove in there were major roadworks preventing us getting to the hotel this was not the hotels fault but would have liked a text to warn me   This was a great location we could walk into the city with ease when we walked back after our evening out it felt very safe even though we were a little late getting back We had drinks in the sky lounge which had fantastic views of the city I would recommend this place and we were able to park very safe under the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We were on 10th floor good views but around 11 00 p m bed time for us we were disturbed by a loud thumping some type of music we think from the roof terrace we spoke with reception but the next night was the same difficult to fall asleep   There was a very good selection of breakfast food hot and cold which I believe would satisfy most people

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: As above  We were promised a room with either a city or courtyard view but looked out at a wall The whole apt was covered in dust and the toilet needed a good clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: size of bed and room the single bed was very small wish they would reconsider that   the location the breakfast the free bottled water and apples in the lobby friendly staff They give you breakfast bags so you can take as much food as you like with you so generous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Missed first days executive lounge allowance because it was closed Drinks in the sky lounge very expensive   The hotel is beautiful and was given a warm welcome in from the pouring rain Staff very helpful Rooms clean Executive lounge had a nice selection of food and drinks Sky lounge beautiful view and very nice Rooms with balcony boast a beautiful view of Amsterdam Ideal location just left of central station Great central base for everything around

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms are very small so as the beds 70 cm wide if you are XL dont try this hotel cause you fell down each night several times   Location was good staffs were freindly excellent WIFI

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The SkyBar was pricey and we could hear the noise from the music being played on Friday night in our room several floors below   Complimentary bottles of water and apples in the lobby were a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hotel is 5 minutes walking from CentralStation and 10 15 from city center We prefer very centered hotels but in this case we made an exception and we hit the jackpot   Hotel is excelent and the people is really nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very comfortable bed lovely pillows A bad pillow can make or break a good nights sleep Excellent location Great breakfast Staff extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We were provided the room which was not even cleaned properly I wouldn t expect a dirty toilet even in a 2 star hotel We showed the picture to the staff and then we were later moved to different room On Friday night we ordered Indian Chicken curry from their menu and it turned out to be a disaster Probably it was our mistake to have ordered Indian dish there in Amsterdam but we were craving for Indian food Basic things like shower caps etc were not there Over all it didn t meet my expectations as I feel it wasn t value for money   Location was good as it was close to the station and city centre was walkable Sky lounge was a good experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The TV volume didn t turn up as loud as I wanted it to to be able to watch it in bed but that was the only minor issue   Everything from the helpful friendly staff at check in to the free headphones in the gym after I d forgotten mine To the ironing facilities in the room Absolutely perfect hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Although we found no fault with the room it was a bit on the snug side for the price   We had a wonderful stay at this hotel from walking in through the door Reception staff were very polite and explained all the hotel had to offer this Hotel had a lot We ate at the Restaurant on the first evening there was also a choice of light snack in the Lobby Bar We also visited the SkyLounge in the evening The breakfast was wonderful so much choice We had a problem with the safe not working on arrival this was rectified within the hour by a very pleasant maintenance man We will return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We had a fantastic warm welcome along with a warm cookie Excellent value for money We were extremely pleased with the lunch and dinner The sky lounge is amazing The staff are super friendly Overall fantastic experience thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Paper cups for tea and coffee in a 4 star hotel Had some washing done which was horrendously expensive and whites came back grey blue   Close to Centraal Staion

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room windows were overlooking the other rooms so the curtains had to be drawn all the time  The breakfast buffet was excellent the staff were prompt friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Expensive hotel for the price breakfast should be included We were in a room on the 10th floor underneath the sky lounge and had to listen to the music into early hours I did complain and was offered ear plugs or move to another room We chose the ear plugs as it was 1 30 am I think we should have been pre worned about the chance of getting a noisey room   Clean comfortable rooms ideal location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Requested a room with mobility access as had surgery recently but this did not appear to happen no shower mat hand rails in shower and quite a substantial climb into the shower Tired after travel and husband did not want fuss of complaining and moving rooms   Warm welcome warm cookies Very comfortable bed slept well Full size hair dryer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room was small with no view but very clean and comfortable   Wonderful big hotel close to the train station and the city centre We would stay again Superb meals at the restaurant and Starbucks for quick coffe and snacks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I was aware of the deposit for my stay which should have been 100 euros however upon arrival they took 450 which was the price of the room plus deposit and when i checked out they took 364 also So now I m out of pocket waiting for them which is just great Shame really because i had a really good stay   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very little could have been better The price could have been lower but that could compromise the good stuff Would have preferred a view room to bay canal etc   Convenient location for our purposes Trains Access to airport etc Will ask for a canal or bay view room next time Staff was helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Staff was very friendly The hotel is located very close to central station so getting to and from the airport is a breeze You are a little out of the way from the main hustle and bustle of the city This can be good for getting away from the noise but bad for adding an extra 3 5 minute walking commute to top sites The Sky Lounge was a great hangout spot with wonderful views of the city Great place to watch the sunset Friday evening was very busy and so was Sunday when we stopped in for a quick drink Hotel helped with tickets to some top sites and also gave us some great suggestions for late night partying

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: An excellently run hotel Staff friendly and knowledgeable only too happy to help you Location close to Centraal station the trams the Rhine Cruise vessels and the canal cruise company boats is very good Always free water bottles in lobby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The very narrow steps to the balcony were difficult to use and I never felt safe on them The shower floor was very slippery when wet   The staff was very accommodating and helpful They ordered taxis for us and directed us to places we wanted to go Very nice experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Would prefer large hotels offered a self serve launderette rather than charge several euros a piece for one laundry item Also some biscuits with in room tea coffee making would be a nice touch   View over Amsterdam from 5th floor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We had a great stay We had a problem with shower in the room when we first got there handled really well and moved to new room Another great touch was the lady who checked us in noticed it was my girlfriends birthday a couple of days before we arrived The lady sent a card and 2 bottles of beer and cookies up for her birthday thought it was a great touch and can t wait to come back and stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Poor A C standards compared to the west made sleep not as comfortable Lack of USB plugs at bedside Typical overpriced items   Location of hotel for price was good Arrival was stunning with great customer service You could walk to the cruise terminal but hotel had an appropriate ride there in 5 minutes for the short trip Ample check in staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Air con was terrible and hardly generated any cool air complained but engineer said he repaired but it made no difference which was disappointing as could not sleep well due to the 21oc temp in the room  Near the station and canal trips not in the busy area but only a 5 minute walk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Roof top bar is very expensive but then again you don t have to go to it   Great location We arrived at 10 in the morning and we were able to check in Rooms very comfortable Lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Weird room layout with a wall of windows onto a mutually shared terrace that was obviously for smokers Necessitated keeping the drapes drawn and lights on all the time  Convenient to train station and City sites for our 16 hour layover Mac computer in the room served online and TV watching Nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room we booked was for 3 persons But only 2 beds arranged first and I had to ask the additional bed and wait for it for one hour Reception staff lady s explanation feel not friendly and too hurry   Wide veriety breakfast Convenient for going to city center

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The checkin and checkout staff were nice Outside of normal hours all but the security guard were rather abrupt and unhelpful Very overpriced box room   Roof top bar was nice Nice shower in bathroom Good location Apple iMac in room was a nice touch with lots of functionality

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms are a bit small Also the mini bar is empty and one has to order to have it filled   Very friendly staff Excellent roof top bar a bit overcrowded in the evenings especially weekends But great during the day for a light lunch and a beer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms are a bit small The mini bar is empty and one needs to order to have it filled   Very friendly staff Excellent roof top bar a bit too crowded in the evenings especially on weekends But great during the day i also liked the ice machine available on several floors

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Exaggerated deposit amount 1550 euro for 6 days instead 50 euro a day according to booking which is billed in practice and released upon checkout Several repeated problems with billing issues Apology wine and 50 off the last day were given   Great location friendly staff clean and nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Though it s wonderful as a tourist hotel if you re on holiday it really is not a great business hotel There is no real business center from which to work and it s quite busy There are two computers in the lobby attached to a printer but they are basically use to print boarding passes and various other travel documents However each room is equipped with an iMac desktop computer that you can print from to the reception desk   The location was perfect for anyone who might be in Amsterdam on holiday It s worth the extra money to get a Canal and City View if you are going to be there for an extended period of time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I liked the location of the hotel also from the customer line when they always helping if something needed and gives you a luxury feeling for a normal price Also im Hhonor member

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Paper cups in the rooms not acceptable despite reason given Bathroom far too small Far too expensive for what we got Music dj in lobby bar too loud to have a relaxing drink there in the evening   Friendly helpful staff Amazing breakfast Super clean rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  Wonderful location Plenty of staff to help with any problem Tickets booked for museums etc and tram tickets sold there A one stop shop for visitors to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I have found that the option for the late check out is just a fiction so it is better not to mention it in advertising The lobby is not so comfortable to wait in it and has almost no chairs   Generally everything is ok

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The price is high  An extraordinary hotel a great environment very helpful stuff a great terace in summer Excellent our preferred hotel in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Fantastic Location right next door to The Grand Station and where the canal cruises begin but rooms are very quiet and spacious enough Breakfast was excellent and even had baked beans The Sky lounge roof terrace bar was buzzing It is pricey but I will stay there again Loved it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: One of the rooms was a little noisy at night Was disappointed to be charged the city tax when it should have been included  Beds were comfy breakfast good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The skybar on the 11th floor is brilliant Perfect to go to at all times of the day for fancy cocktails and bites to eat superb location right beside centraal station Modern and elegant looking hotel and rooms were perfect for a weekend stay and longer if necessary

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Lobby bar staff were rude Room wasn t ready on arrival Trying to charge us for the room on card when already paid in cash on checkout   Bed was comfy Good location Nice and modern hotel Restraunt in hotel was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very simple rooms no pool bit of a hike to my favourite 9 streets area but tram very proximal  Close to the station functional with friendly staff Nice but expensive rooftop bar with extensive city views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: If you book through Booking com you don t get any points if you re a Hilton member Just FYI   Literally right beside the central train station in Amsterdam and immediately above Enterprise rental car Rooms are nice There s a Starbucks downstairs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It s a good deal location wise as it is walking distance from the historical center Very large underground parking I recommend it for a weekend in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Check in not allowed until the exact second stated We flew all nite then had to wait until their check in time Most will allow a little leeway  location excellent room size good for Amsterdam nice and close to walk to the cruise terminal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: On two of the three days the room was not made up at 15 00 hrs This is very inconvenient as a mature couple who enjoy an afternoon rest Apologies from the manager with wine and fruit Lack of staff being the excuse not acceptable for a star hotel   Excellent breakfast buffet Convenient parking at a reasonable price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  Super clean and comfortable room equipped with everything you could need and more The location was perfectly central The sky bar was exceptional and I had wonderful birthday cocktails with stunning views over Amsterdam I wouldn t hesitate to stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Paper cups bad idea but rescued by asking for proper porcelain tea cups Managers like paper cups as cuts down losses and breakages and pilfering and cleaning Guests expect old fashioned values at this level of service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  The staff at the hotel went above and beyond from the get go when we arrived at the hotel on Friday evening upon signing in they presented me and my other half a warm cookie wow who does that I thought that was amazing To our surprise they even decorated our room with birthday banners and confetti During the second day upon returning to the hotel we was greeted with a bottle of wine two glasses a birthday card from the hotel and a giant birthday chocolate cookie cake On all days at the reception they gave us free bottles of water and apples which I felt was really considerate The view from our room was also amazing and the hotel itself is right by the river The train station is a 10 second walk away to which made the hotel easy to locate and to get to

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: At check in I was informed that booking com had charged my credit card despite I clearly asked for cash payment I do not believe it anyhow The hotel charged my card previous to my arrival on schedule I got a handicapped equipped room as this was the last they had The minibar was empty and no water in the room No value for money sorry I will look next time for another hotel   I was disappointed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: When we arrived our booking was not in the system We had booked a suite as it was a special occasion The receptionist was difficult about the situation and really did not treat us with much courtesy Instead offering us a basic room for a nominal discount We stood our ground and eventually got sorted out but I really would have liked for it to be dealt with in a more professional manner The rooms were very basic which I suppose I am used to with Amsterdam hotels However I do expect a certain standard with the housekeeping on both occasions the maid had been it looked like half a job I don t think I would stay here again In comparison to the other Double Trees we have stayed at it really was a little bit disappointing a shame really when it promised so much   The location was very good easy access to the city center and only a short walk from the train station We also had access to the Executive Lounge which was ideal for breakfast and for pre dinner drinks The Sky Lounge is also worth a visit to see the wonderful views over the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The smell in the room was bad since the windows can t open at all The same and even worst smell to the corridor of the hotel   Perfect location excellent breakfast wonderful view if your room is not looking to the railway station like ours

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I am very unhappy that I get no credit for staying at a Hilton Hotel because I booked through Booking com We are Hilton honor members and do not get credit and could Not use the executive lounge because of Booking com The price for room was very high and we got no advantages because of the way I booked   Locatin was awesome

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: couldn t fault it   warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch plenty of staff on so no waiting at reception easy to find from station and a short walk from the canal etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: As a diamond member I used to get benefits hilton have apparently changed the rules without telling me Would have cost the hotel nothing to say oh thats terrible sir let us fix it this time and you are now aware for your next stay I got quoted the rule book End result being I wont book into any hilton again Real shame for them as I do over 100 hotel nights a year   It was an ok hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Super friendly staff We had one minor problem with room s view but they solved it really quickly Cool bar on top of the building with a great view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: For the cost of the room I would have liked a bath as well as a shower  The staff were exceptionally helpful The room was really comfortable and the view was a mazing The location was perfect for exploring the city and travelling to and from the airport

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The fact that on check in the staff didn t say the rate included breakfast when it did and not having had breakfast in the hotel they would refund the 120 IE 2 x 3 days Instead they tried to blame me for not checking the confimation but the booking com on my iPhone did not confirm either so I paid twice each day for breakfast I will not stay at a Hilton again I use hotels a lot and on check in they normally tell you the breakfast times and location but this Hilton did not do that   The location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Never ending banging of doors by cleaning staff on the floor going in and out of rooms been cleaned really very frustrating  Overall everything was good as usual from location to breakfasts all good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The prices in the SkyLounge  Location was excellent to seeing all of the sites of the city Fantastic choice for breakfast hire bikes from reception Great way to spend the day Would highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I arrived at the Hotel at 13 45 pm checked in but it was 17 15pm before my room was ready for me to move into meaning I had to sit about the hotel reception area for 4 hours   The room was clean tidy with a comfy bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I would like to pay more attention to the cleanliness of the room the floor was dusty and dust was everywhere in the room including the table chairs cupboard etc the cleaners don t use vacuum cleaner to remove the dust and in addition I would suggest to put some dishes cups cutlery plates and glasses in the room   Everything staff treatment service flexibility food comfort friendly and supportive attitude of staff welcome with cookies cleanliness of the bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Staff were very friendly and helpful throughout the hotel reception concierge bar and restaurant made you relax instantly knowing they were clearly committed to being there to help Rooms were very nicely furnished and spacious and very clean and surprisingly quiet for the location Great views from the bar on floor 11 and good food in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: towels old and thin bathmat very shabby Tv kept turning on3 times during night while asleep Not value for money for the price Luggage had to be handled by ourselves  Bed fine but hot doona could have done with a blanket

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the rooms are pretty small and anonymous no color The mini bar was empty Our view was towards the trains and not towards the city   excellent location 100 meters from the Central station and walking distance from sightseeing Nice rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Some loud music at night Price little expensive   Modern very central og good facilities Especially the sky lounge with open air area and great view across the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We prefer porcelain mugs in the room but were too lazy to get the staff to change it   We loved the apples and water available at front desk The guest service staff were very helpful and knowledgeable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I stayed for two nights one very late the other i came back after a long day and no housekeeping done I also got a room that i had to walk a lot to Poor  The location only

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Expensive but I guess due to location it was ok but the price did not include breakfast which would have made the room price overly expensive There are better priced central places to stay but for a cruise this was a better choice pricewise than the Movenpick   We chose this hotel due to the closeness to the terminal for a cruise It was an easy 10 minute walk with the suitcases to board our cruise ship Also we had rented a car from Sixt and their office is right beside the hotel lobby so made it easy to collect and drop off car

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: They tried to charge us more than the agreed price and at this stage i do not know if I have been refunded with the extra charge   Location close to railway station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: AC not strong enough The windows only open a couple of inches they claimed that it s for safety reasons which is a very stupid and insulting excuse The shower head was loose and required readjustment every minute   Great pillows and nice firm bed Great views from the window city view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Went to the Sky lounge one night Ordered rum with coke and vodka with cranberry 37 00 WTH Been to many cities but never had a one shot drink at that price   Staff was helpful and friendly Hotel was immaculate Beds were comfy and location was perfect Very pleased

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: it was no window in the room and i think is something i need to know before A staff had just an other room with a very bed view In a second day a staff did not change a bed dressing and it was not clean so they stay not clean one day more  A staff were nice A Jim is very good Everything is really clean Location is crazy a bed was very comfortable also a shower

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nowhere to put clothes TV and iMac system that didn t work There was no guide to features of the room and how to work them most good hotels have one   Position Views over Amsterdam Helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Price of breakfast was prohibitive Geared towards business travellers rather than leisure   Excellent location by Amsterdam Central Very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Waited until 4pm to check in as the housekeeping were very slow at cleaning all of the rooms They didn t seem to care much about providing us with this delay either Balcony room is very small For the price you would get a more impressive room at the Kraznopolsky Empty mini bar fridge and no bath You d expect a bath at these costs   Fantastic views from balcony room Great breakfast SkyLounge is beautiful yet overpriced

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Rooms with river and city views have no window ventilation inner courtyard windows do have Pillows and quilt too thin Breakfasts too expensive   Staff very courteous and efficient Hotel spotlessly clean Room facilities with iron and hairdryer very useful Warm cookie on arrival and complimentary free water at desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Staff was lacking genuine interest to assist and help We were endlessly waiting to get into our room Needless to say that this was the first time in my life where room booked at the executive floor was not prepared and available in a timely manner I understand the challenges of serving a large number of guests but it should not be excuse for nonchalant attitude   Location was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing I can think of   The staff were wonderful They all were friendly helpful and welcoming The atmosphere contributed to our holiday as did the location of the hotel and the wonderful views in both directions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The price I m usually more of a budget hotel or B B sort of person but I have to say it was worth splashing the cash for a special ocassion   Free warm cookie on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room was not clean dusty no vacuum for the carpet little far from the market if you need to go to supermarket or pharmacy or to do shopping  Near the central station the view love the decoration of the room and all the facilities you need you can find it in The soundproof of the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Didn t dislike anything it was great sometimes had to wait a bit at reception to get seen to but other than that perfect   The breakfast was absolutely brilliant Very good and nice range of food and always topped up The staff were so lovely and were happy to help whenever we needed assistance or directions The sky lounge is such a gem amazing cocktails and amazing view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I have booked a room with two single beds however They gave me a roon with only one bed The staff of the Skylonge take to long to serve the tables   Location restaurants and bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It was super over priced For 210 a night you are aloud to expect a lot more The corridors were not very nice and up to scratch Room was comfortable but again for that sort of price it could be a lot more luxurious and a bit bigger There is paper cups instead of mugs for coffee and plastic cups instead of glasses in the bathroom I mean thats not really a problem but it s what you would expect from a MotelOne not from a hotel that is more than double the price per night Restaurant looked nice but also very packed There were some problems connecting to the wifi but it worked after a call to the lobby and a short conversation with the IT company Again nice hotel and everything is fine but maybe for a MotelOne type price My max for this hotel would be 120 per night For the price we payed the room needs to be more up to scratch   Very nice skylounge bar Very good staff there drinks were pricy but still fair Good value for money there and its really a cool bar with lots of people and music and a great view of the city Location of this property is really great just next to the Centraal Station in Amsterdam Mac instead of TV is really practical as you can watch TV and use it to research places to go etc Rooms comfortable and nice lobby We got free cookies on check in which was quite cool

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I would have loved a bath in my room but hey can t have it all   I had just cycled from the ferry and was pretty cold when I got there and was greeted with a huge smile and a warm cookie Staff were absolutely excellent providing a safe place or my bike a map of the city and some friendly chat Room was perfect and right in the heart of the city couldn t recommend this place enough

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Despite allowing dogs this is not a particularly pet friendly hotel making you sign a somewhat restrictive waiver room allocated was in a very busy and noisy part of the property which is disrupting for animals staff will accommodate a change if you ask room was small and furnishings not clean stained chair and marked carpet expensive by comparison lifts were ridiculously busy and unpleasant at peak hours no close toileting spot for animals lit light switch on the wall is VERY bright at night   Staff are lovely and check in was super and welcoming Location is very central

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The Executive lounge was disappointing We ate breakfast in the regular restaurant much better selection The evening snacks were just that snacks were the same every day Would have preferred a regular tv screen in the room instead of the Apple monitor on the desk It was difficult for 2 person to watch because you had to turn on your side to see the screen   The location was perfect Next door to central train station Easy access for walking We had a excellent view from our room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
