Full_Review: Breakfast was expensive so we went to nearby cafes Deposit of 50 Euros per person is required as damage waiver for room  Great service from staff Free bottled water and fruit available in reception Comfortable room felt brand new All mod cons Had a great view of the city Excellent location close to all public transport and easy walking distance to city centre Room was available when we checked in early at 10am Bikes were available to hire for 15 Euros per day Sky Lounge is impressive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We were on the 9th floor and could hear some music from the rooftop bar on the 11th floor but it didn t keep us awake   The location was perfect rooms were very modern and clean and the staff were lovely and super helpful with directions and restaurant recommendations The rooftop bar was very nice with a great view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Went up to the sky lounge to check out the floating tulips but they hadn t yet arrived Not to worry the manager arranged for a bunch in our room Wow Very thoughtful We were thrilled

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Hotel bike hire a bit pricey You can rent bikes in MacBikes for less   Excellent location Right beside Central Station Great Staff who where always very helpful Would come back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Rooms overlooking the central station can be disturbing for light sleepers We had to pay extra to move to another room on the canal side which was more quiet Booking com should indicate this fact on their list for hotels   This centrally located hotel is only 5 years old everything is modern comfortable and clean Breakfast and dinner at hotel s rest was fine Best of all was the hospitable attentive and smiling service from all of the hotel personnel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The foods served at the Executive Lounge during the 6pm 8pm Too crowded and foods are quite limited For 2 days we didn t get to enjoy the snacks because too many people in the lounge and foods served and gone within minutes D Not a major problem for us though We enjoyed the view at the lounge and the drinks P  It was our first time staying with this hotel as well as our first time in Amsterdam We were delighted to be upgraded to the Executive Queen room which we were allowed the excess of the executive lounge as well Rooms are clean spacious Staffs are very helpful Fast check ins The location is perfect for us Convenient public transports within walking distance from the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Double bed can be bigger   Very convenient location Easy access to Chinatown and Red Light area Nice room balcony view was so good New and generously decorated I liked the apple computer in the room I was able to listen to music easily

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Despite we ordered 4 small bottle of water they brought us 4 big bottle When we rejected this they did not accept During the check out we proved them we did not touch 3 bottle and they brought us something we did not order they still charged us with 4 big bottle This was not nice Besides wardrobes would be a bit bigger but not a big deal anyway   The location was perfect We had a city and river view which was amazing The hotel and the room we stayed was very nice and comfortable really

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The manager gave us a free drinks coupon on arrival because the room wasn t ready And Ms Pebbles gave us a bottle of wine on the house to celebrate our honeymoon Very very close to central station Friendly staffs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I thought there would have been a spa in the hotel and maybe a bath in the room Sky bar was extremely expensive   Location was perfect in walking distance from everything but not in the middle of the hustle and bustle lovely food in restaurant downstairs staff were extremely helpful complimentary warm cookies and welcome package on arrival and free bottled water all day everyday

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Perfect stay no dislikes  Room location helpfulness of the staff attentiveness room was absolutely spotless brilliant housekeeping Sky lounge was brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: MAKE SURE YOU TAKE A CREDIT CARD They charge you 50 pounds per day for the deposit of the room If you take a debit they have to actually charge you it and refund this to you costing you 2 pounds in transactions Was not impressed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Having paid over 240 for a room I did not expect the view to of a multiple railway tracks where the trains were non stop all night   The place is nice l and attention to detail even better

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Some noises from the sky lounge  The staff and generousty of them by providing extra bed and upgrade for free Also liked the free water bottles and apples in the lobby The starbucks connected to the hotel added a nice touch as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room is more than basic they should not call it Queen room double bed was vey small it was cold in the room  Location great breakfast and kind staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing at all  can t say a bad word about this hotel If its your first trip stay here right next to the train station and a 5 minute walk from most places you will want to go for example the dam square

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: If you could provide some sort of transport cycle for people with more than 3 4 big bags to drop off till the Amsterdam Centraal Station that would be utterly wonderful   The smiling nature of the staff be it the front desk to the concierge to the people serving the breakfast buffet Me and my wife travelled for our honeymoon to Europe and we stayed in Double Tree Hilton in Mar 16 The breakfast buffet has a huge spread with decent quantity offerings in vegetarian and non vegetarian food The front desk staff gave us a complimentary bottle of wine as a gesture for spending our honeymoon at their hotel The rooms were graciously adorned with pretty good views of the city and the waterfront The hotel is a 5 min walk from the Amsterdam Centraal Station which is the main station connecting Amsterdam with major cities in Europe All the people were wonderfully friendly and I would definitely recommend this is as the best place to stay in Amsterdam You are bound to walk away with a broad smile on your face once you have stayed at this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Loved the room with a balcony the Skylounge is fab the executive lounge very handy for a snack the Eastwood restaurant does a lovely steak the hotel staff are just brilliant beyond belief as pleasing good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Expensive drinks limited 24 hour room service choice plug at both sides of bed  Very comfy bed delicious welcome cookie great that you offer free bottles of water and apples quick check in out clean rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about but as I have to put something in milk as an option for making a drink in the room we don t like cream in tea   Location was fantastic and staff were welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hotel has a modern design Great location The room is clean and well equipped The service team were very nice and helpful The executive lounge was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Initial reception started well with towel arrived during a storm and warm biscuit then the hard sell started First was to have access to executive lounge which we did not want Once refused we were told that there was still a great room available it turned out that this was on the 10th floor and when I noted that others had commented that this was noisy from the bar above the receptionist agreed that we were unlikely to have undisturbed sleep The only other option was a courtyard view room which considering I had already paid for a deluxe room we were disappointed with Eventually I paid an upgrade to get a room with a city view and the unwanted executive lounge was thrown in The manner of this young lady was pushy and very unpleasant a shame as other hotel staff were friendly and helpful I would not recommend this hotel on our reception experience and the eventual high price of the room  The rooms were clean and adequately equipped The room we eventually got after being forced to pay for an upgrade was quiet with a good view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: my room was charged for breakfast even though I didn t order it or have it The money was refunded to my account but I was refunded less than they had charged me   The bed was a standard single bed Nothing special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The bed is too hard ATM not on site  Very pleasant and accommodating staff I had to make several updates to my reservation due to schedule changes during my stay Further they have very flexible liberal pet policy at this hotel which is a differentiator for me I stayed here 3 years ago and had same experience this time Same pleasant stay still love Sky Lounge room service was fast and food reasonable and good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The hotel is near the central train station and the old town It also has its own connecting walkthrough to Starbucks The staff always said hello or good morning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I was given a room on the 10th floor right below the SkyBar which played music until 4 00 AM was up all night and had a business meeting next morning I asked to be moved was moved to the 9th floor better but still could hear the bar music I don t know that I will book this hotel in the future or ask for room below the 6th floor  Location was ideal if you had a short stay in Amsterdam and easy access to the train system

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: nothing the view on the station is not the best option if it is possible chose the city view   everything the bar at the 11th floor is breathtaking the steak hous inside has superb food the staff is friendly and professional the room are big and fully equipped

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Water pressure could have been better at times And to my surprise I could spot the odd tray with room service leftovers lying in the corridor outside a room for a full 24 hours before it got picked up   Top location next to the central railway station with view of city centre and the canals Perfect breakfast buffet excellent view from the sky lounge bar and good drinks Free wifi and complimentary Mac computer in your room Rooms and bathrooms really modern stylish and spacious No complaints in general My favourite hotel in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I didn t like that the beds kept coming apart whenever my husband tryed to cuddle me my view was of a train lane and everytime I wanted I cigarette I had to go downstairs as I did not have a balcony  The staff was very friendly and the bed was soooo comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Amazing breakfast choices was absolutely worth the little extra to Include breakfast Staff couldn t do enough to help and sky bar was very good although a little expensive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I would recommend trying to prebook a room to the front of the hotel as the rooms at the back have no view  Love this hotel we have stayed several times and would always stay here Great location and fab hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We were originally booked in for one night in transit had to stay an extra night because of the snow storms on the east coast of America Hotel staff were excellent My companion was ill during the first day hotel arranged for a doctor delivered the medications to the room Brilliant service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The breakfast was expensive and not good value but we breakfasted in Starbucks next door   The breakfast was expensive and not good value but we breakfasted in Starbucks next door

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It is expensive   we were looking over the station tracks and harbour but found the sound proofing in the hotel excellent The view from the hotel roof top bar The location The staff The apple computers in the room Excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: A bath in the room instead of just a shower would have been better   The guest services in reception were extremely helpful and the hotel was immaculate

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room was perfect with this amazing view across amsterdam city Access to the executive lounge is nice with complementary beverages and bites Staff was wonderfull as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The sky lounge is extortionately priced It was 19 for a tanqueray 10 and tonic It was upwards of 5 for a cappuccino There was no happy hour or offers for hotel residents and we were priced out of the place so there is no incentive to go there This is a shame considering it had real potential to be the cherry on top of a great weekend   The concierge service is amazing The guys really know Amsterdam and were able to make some great suggestions around restaurants and clubs to check out They also were friendly even after our check out which is a testimant to the hotel as many places don t offer this

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The rooms and bathrooms are overall very underwhelming though some rooms do allow for great views The beds are not very good by any stretch of the imagination very hard   The hotel has a great rooftop bar with fantastic views of the city Also the workout facility is relatively large with a lot of equipment choices

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We noticed a brown spot in the bathroom which had not been cleaned well before our arrival However the room was really clean   The bed was really confortable and the location was great 5 minutes walking till the central station Another practical detail there is a huge public parking under the hotel accessible wiht a lift which is rather cheap compared to other parkings in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very impressed our room had a Mac computer it was immaculate we had room service one night which was great and the food in the restaurant was gorgeous The staff are very helpful and friendly so I will always choose this hotel when staying in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  The hotel was amazing Perfect location and everything you need all in one place Guest services were great at recommending restaurants and places to visit The view from our balcony was incredible Breakfast was also amazing will definitely be returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The room was nice but for the price I was expecting a lot more If the room is turned to the train station not even in higher floors the noise is ok specially during the night   People that worked at the hotel were very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Unfortunately the shower in our room wasn t working but the matter was resolved immediately by using another room close by   Duty Manager of hotel Lysanne went the extra mile to help me when I had my wallet stolen Similarly the Duty Manager in Starbucks attached to hotel was extremely helpful All staff in general were really friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Costs to get a room with a balcony small rooms overpriced everything rude guests  Private balcony view housekeeper fulfilled my request surprisingly early check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It s quite expensive but then you get what you pay for I guess The food at the restaurant was very expensive to and only really posh stuff that I m not a fan of But didn t matter for us as we prefer to eat out in local restaurants anyway which in Amsterdam there are plenty of and there much cheaper   Very nice hotel very clean and nice friendly staff Location is very good with the main central parts of the city only few minutes walk away We had a room with a balcony which is a great touch if you smoke nice city view to

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: There was a mix up over our room The hotel didn t have a room suitable for us on our 1St night and so we had to change Our new room was still not ready at 6pm the next day They did look after us well however   The location The cleanliness The Sky Lounge Nathalie at the front desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: When we arrived on the first day there where bottles and glasses in our hall way which werent moved by staff until late on the second day Someone had also placed a tray of dirty glasses outside our door which werent moved for a good day or so even though cleaners had been in and cleaned all the rooms on our floor   Location of this hotel was perfect a short 5 minute stroll to the busy red light district which meant we had zero noise coming into our room from the outside

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Couldn t recommend this hotel enough it was fantastic the staff were great and done everything they could for you Perfect location great value for money spotlessly clean very modern great views over the canal and city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Requested 2 rooms on same floor never happened Asked for nice view as this was our anniversary never happened worst view possible room 311 and 411 Dirty towel left on seat in shower from check in until we left have photos to show this Half the breakfast ordered to the room not delivered Never asked on check out of any problems Will never be back for the price I paid for 2 rooms for a very special occasion and I had emailed ahead and was told they booked the rooms in on same floor just a discrace  Close to everything

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing  One if the best hotels I have ever stayed in Amazing staff even brought me ginger and honey tea for a sore throat Everything about this hotel is perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Very friendly and efficient staff We were able to check in at 10am so freeing us up for the day The sky bar is great The views spectacular and very friendly service again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Coridors are too narrow and felt like I as walking in the corridors of a cruise ship As the Sky Lounge is open to everyone there is a risk that anyone can walk through guest floors without a card

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: A bit expensive for the type of room that we got but still worth it specially for the location   The location is very good the rooftop just amazing and breakfast was good the breakfast room is all window so we had a nice view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Would prefer bath to ease the aches and pains after all the walking we did Price of alcohol a bit steep  The locality for Central station and canal tram and bus amenities Excellent base for sight seeing Good quality food menus are varied executive lounge well worth the money Staff are fab always polite helpful and willing to assist with anything Have included pics from balcony view rm 831 sky lounge and our room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The two twin beds linked together to make a double bed I could not sleep in the middle   I was really sick when I arrived they sent a doctor up to my room at 2 AM on a Saturday night and I was only charged 80 Euros I was amazed and so happy to see him

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Lot of business people live there and the price a little high For disable is a long way to walk to inn Amsterdam Extremely busy at breakfast time   Very quiet at night and the view was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The Staff Very rude and do not have good customer services although the cleaners are friendly My mobile phone was taken at the reception and the Staff were not helpful in helping me to retrieve this   location and balcony view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was 100   Check in was really quick the staff where really friendly and helpful I thought the cookie was a nice touch that we received when we were checking in Rooms are spotless beds are very comfortable Skybar was packed everytime we went up either day or night was a shame that tables couldn t be booked Location was 9 10 a tiny 10 minute walk to Dam square Our room over looked the river which was lit up nice at night time Complimentry apples and bottles of water at reception Really enjoyed my stay We absolutely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Price of drinks in sky lounge be prepared to pay for the Stunning views of Amsterdam city  Ideal location for a first time visit to Amsterdam Staff were very helpful and knowledgable for directions and supplied maps We also forgot to take continental plugs and after a quick call to reception a member of staff was at the door with one in minutes free of charge Hotels interior presentation is stylish but Comfortable and we felt very relaxed and safe in bar restaurant areas Guest rooms that include the use of the Executive lounge are well worth the extra for the 6 8 evening drinks and snacks there is also 24 hr tea coffee They also supply complimentary bottles of water and apples at reception aswell as warm cookies as you check in an added little touch to start your holiday with

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Asked for disabled room was put on 6th floor at other end of building Took 50 euros per night per room off us on arrival Wasn t mentioned beforehand Booked a birthday package and room wasn t ready and available until past midnight on the night we arrived Rooms were small and basic Paper cups and limited beverages in room No little biscuits with coffee Asked for twin room got double   Hotel was immaculate

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We are in the restaurant and my friend dropped some crisp over its took the staff around 45 minutes to clean it apart from that every thing was okay  I enjoyed ever part of my stay and will definitely stay again when I return to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: trains passing the hotel noisy at times our room was facing the railway lines upon arrival we found that ur re booking was not confirmed via Booking com and had to wait a long time to get a room   Great food at the in house restaurant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: No bad experience Our stay was great Only comment people have smoked in the room in the past you could still smell it   The view from our room was great Ideally situated right next to centraal station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing but perhaps the price could have been cheaper   Brand new so everything in top condition Room and bathroom were spacious with high quality fixtures and fittings Atrium is impressive and gave a real feeling of space Easy indoor walk to the airport terminal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Location was excellent Room and facilities were clean and functional There is a printer available to guests in the hotel lobby free of charge which I thought was a fantastic facility There is also a Starbucks on the ground floor which is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: In the additional information whilst booking I requested a bath we got a room with no bath This is the only thing that I can say was negative about the stay   We went away for my girlfriends birthday I let the staff know whilst we were checking in and by the time we got up to our room we had complimentary wine snacks and a birthday card was all ready and waiting for us This really showed that the staff do care for the customers

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Minor disagreement over deposit being handed back but was resolved quickly and staff were really helpful and gave me a tin of hilton cookies as a good will gesture   Nice clean comfy room was outstanding apple mac computer in our room came in really handy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The staff at the hotel were extremely helpful as we took ill during our trip and so unfortunately we got limited amount of time site seeing but the attention to detail and service we received was first class The rooms were comfortable and food was excellent with a great location next to the train station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: No complaints at all  Excellent location staff was very helpful Overall great experience They were kind to send greetings and champagne on our anniversary too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Volume on English TV Channels was not very good No ITV Channel popular channel in UK   Very friendly Reception staff we arrived early but was allowed to check in Lovely views English TV Channels Tea Coffee facilities in room Secure left baggage facility Availability of smoking rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We arrived in the morning and had told the hotel our flight time so we checked in at about 10am which was brilliant Gave us time for a nap before going out to see the sights The best hotel we have stayed at in Amsterdam Amazing location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The location of the hotel was very convenient for my first visit to Amsterdam It was clean and comfortable with a good restaurant and bar and excellent breakfast facilities I would book to stay here again as there is so much to see in this beautiful and interesting city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I didn t like the suite It was very sterile and not very comfortable Didn t like the fact the the TV s were iMacs   The ground floor was decent Restaurant was pretty good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room smelled terrible from smokers in a non smoking room They brought an air purifier but it didn t do enough And to top it off there was a full ashtray outside our door when we arrived should have known it wasn t going to end well They did do a nice solid and selected my wife as Guest of the Day Great little bonus but sadly we selected our perks and were told it would be in our room when it was ready fruit basket w wine and drink vouchers for the sky bar Sadly they were not there and after my wife asked the front desk twice they finally came through Hope if they try to make people feel special in the future they follow thru the first time not the third Tried watching the news on the Mac that is the TV and because of the air purifier you couldn t hear it Nice amenity but poorly executed if it is to double as the TV So I read the paper instead and did get to see an awesome London Times editorial cartoon lampooning Trump so maybe it s a win   Parking is amazing Most convenient in out we have had in a major European city and safe To top it up 12 for 24hrs is awesome Prolly would stay there again just because of parking Executive Lounge is a must View from balcony suite is legit

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I loved the hotel staff all in general are super professional and they really care about clients Normally i always stay in 5 hotels and this one being a 4 is far better than many superior hotels Trust in what i have to say this hotel is really great the staff the rooms great breakfast sky lounge on the rooftop is fun I have to say as well thank you to Am lcar from far the best professional i ve met made me feel at home and was always concerned with clients being happy I really felt at home with him what a wonderfull person and professional for a 7 hotel I normally travel to Amsterdam a couple of times a year and from now this hotel will be the home i choose yes the home i really felt it For ending thank you for everything and continue the great work i see that if people that are working are happy with the job and are treated well by the bosses from the top it will reflect in the experience for the clients This is a happy hotel Best Regards Nuno

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The complimentary wifi was a little unreliable The hotel was fully booked so at night prime time good luck connecting on your own device   The location was absolutely fantastic you are right by the centraal station and within minutes walking distance into the centre of town The warm welcome cookie was a lovely extra touch and an apple mac in your room was a great surprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Awful terrible service I requested to change my booking as I had a change of plan I was travelling for business and not on holiday The staff at front desk took ten minutes to talk to the manager to tell me they couldn t help me I had to contact Booking com I was pressed for time on a short stay When I asked to change the booking I had to rush to a meeting I did have the time to call or e mail Booking com wait for their reply take it back to the reception and again wait for them to process the change in booking This was an absolute farce I had just previously stayed at the Marriott at the city before and they had absolutely no problem accommodating the same request I even stayed with them again after returning from a meeting in another city The front desk staff told me it s not our room anymore we sell it to Booking com They were simply wrong It s their hotel they simply pass on the commission for the stay to Booking com Yet more mis leading information on their Booking com description they advertise as offering Crabtree Evelyn toiletries They most certainly do not Their toiletries are Aroma Actives Essentials by Sysco Guest Supply I use Crabtree Evelyn and it appealed to me when making my booking Sadly Hilton once again disappointed It does not encourage me to stay at any Hilton property again and I don t think I would recommend to my colleagues or business partners either They may not care for the loss of business but I don t think it would be insignificant All I got from the hotel manager was a standard rather insincere apology and an offer of a discount on my next stay However it is not the price or discount that matters to me but the service Service is what matters for business travellers as opposed to leisure travel Sorry Hilton if you got to the end of this rather long review   Location was not too far from Centraal train station although there are hotels closer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room excellent staff great bathroom good have  All staff were very friendly and helpful the Australian waitress was excellent and concierges desk very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The only aspect for me was the fim lighting down stairs This however is a interior design direction   Well positioned and close by transport eg train and trams Availability of executive lounge was a great asset Loved views from window Facilities such as iron was much appreciated after travelling

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Amsterdam accommodations are expensive with the Doubletree being good value in comparison   Right on the harbour next to central train station walking distance to many sights Great little fitness room Very clean and comfortable modern decor rooms Great views from Skybar with good variety of food for all palates Walking distance to cruise ship port

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Staff should me be more flexible and personal with guest instead of highly professional all times ALSO sky lounge was always much crowded   Location facility room size value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Location excellent in the city centre but yet separated from the crowd Very clean service is also on top level everything you need just ask and be sure it will be done

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: A long way from cheaper eating places except for those near the railway station Breakfast should have been included for the price charged   Close to Central Station and the Port and the trams Easy to walk through the Canal district Easy to visit the museums Wifi was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Nothing   the junior suite booked was spacious modern An added bonus was the complimentary drinks and nibbles provided in the executive lounge The staff were helpful and polite at all times Overall we were more than happy with our stay at the hotel and would definitely stay here again when returning to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: We had a meal at Eastwood the hotel restaurant and found it to be quite poor considering the cost of the meal On our floor the carpets smelt as if they were damp   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Room was not ready until 3 hours after check in time Room had stained carpet WiFi was practically useless could barely connect and slow when connected   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: It seems they don t have enough staff to clean the rooms daily our room was not made everyday and one time was only going to be made up late the afternoon   The location en facilities are very good The rooftop bar is nice We enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Long walk to the lift which was part and parcel of the beautiful water view we had  The location was excellent right next to the railway station and next door to the cruise terminal so we had a 5 minute walk arriving and departing This hotel is well equipped very clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: A dirty toilet is a definite no no The queen beds are very small you might consider not booking a one queen room for two adults And although we asked for a quiet room we heard a band playing loudly on the fabulous that s true rooftop deck And the tipsy people in the elevators on a weekend night going to the rooftop deck aren t pleasant either   The location is perfect next to the Central Station and on a walking distance to the old city center And an iMac in your room is awesome too But those are unfortunately the only two great things about this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Had to return twice when we checked in as the room wasn t ready Not a good start The room hadn t been cleaned on the second day when we returned at 6pm very bad The room was ok though better suited to one person as quite compact   Very clean hotel Free bottled water in the lobby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: arrived early in the morning and had booked the room from night before but the room wasnt held because the hotel was full so had to wait 5 hours to get the room   location excellent breakfast very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The staff was super friendly and helpful They were able to make reservations at every restaurant we requested It was also my birthday and they left a little gift for me in the room It was also really convenient for public transportation Our room had a beautiful view of the city We also had a computer which doubled as the TV If the wireless seemed slow we just jumped on the computer to look up directions and restaurants All in all we would be happy to stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Bed was very hard but staff had an additional foam mattress added after the first night Hotel restaurant was good the first night but horrible the last night of our stay Our waiter was evidently the main problem Spoke English well but didn t understand but pretended to what we were ordering   Faculty was modern and clean in every way you would expect from Hilton The morning brunch was outstanding Wifi was powerful and plenty Concierges were very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: I arrived after long haul flight from Australia feeling very unwell The hotel staff were excellent in expediting a room arranging Doctor and collecting my prescription in extremely efficient helpful and pleasant manner I spent my time in Amsterdam predominantly in my room which was very comfortable On my departure a charming porter walked my luggage with me to my train He made sure my luggage was safe and I was comfortable This is such wonderful customer service and not readily discovered in our modern world I absolutely recommend each and every member of your team who made my stay a much more pleasant experience than it could have been with ill health Compliments to you all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Arrived earlier than 3pm for check in and our room was not ready which was acceptable At 3pm we checked again and it was not ready we had to wait and complain until we got another room through a better staff member   Great location close to central station Warm cookies at check in Small kids playground behind the business like center Starbucks and Sixt car rental are available

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: bed was really small given two Singal beds as we booked on one big double bed No bath at all   Close to the central station Nice sight at near canal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Can t think of anything   Loved the SkyLounge bar great view tasty snacks and amazing cocktails Location excellent for transportation nightlife and shopping Rooms clean comfortable beds and hotel staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The security was very poor with anyone accessing through the lift to all floors No room key access to the lift therefore anyone could enter the accomodation floors We witnessed a drug deal go down three doors from our room on the 6th floor   Staff at the front desk where very attentive to our needs but the messages did not seem to get through to the service dept Location was great and very close to the city cente and main railway station Many people used the hotel as a staging location for jionoing and leaving river cruises

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The reception service was great with a free cookie on arrival made you really feel welcome The staff were very helpful with booking tours and information around Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: Things had run out and were not replenished if you were late down to breakfast Room not large but it contained a lot Milk substitute supplied on drinks tray tasted foul   Near to station Excellent choice for breakfast Although see other comments View from Sky Lounge and bedroom Comfortable bed All facilities needed in room Fridge hot drink making etc Wifi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: the bed was a bit small and we were on the 10th floor so we could hear the music from the lounge but we didnt mind it much  Our stay was amazing it close to everything the staff were very welcoming and they made us check in early

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station
Full_Review: The only improvement I d suggest is more choice on room service and forgetting a service charge of 5 50 when all you yearn for is a bowl of fries Why should customers have to pay a service charge on top of the daily room rate doesn t that include providing service   A nice warm welcome from Lesley on reception including a warm chocolate chip cookie Always nice after a journey Very easy to get to from the airport short train trip and about 10 minutes stroll Location is fab easy to wander into the tourist areas but far enough out to not be in a crowd of party goers all the time Room not the biggest but nicely furnished and a free Apple Mac pc tv Free water and apples fruit I ve stayed in Hiltons all round the world over 30 years and for the first time ever someone knocked on my door and unprompted asked if I was happy with the cleaning The Sky Lounge is fantastic and as well as serving nice drinks and complimentary popcorn has an amazing panoramic view over the city Much better than the one everyone talks about at the library Overall I d recommend to anyone and will use it next time I come to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station

Full_Review: Reception It always took more time than it should
Reception was excellent We did last minute booking and was given a room early in the morning Extremely helpful and nice hotel staff Very spacious room and good location

Poor lighting in the room despite the fact one of the bed side lights was out of order no carpet on the floor making the room feeling unpleasant and in general dark The bathroom 1 hairdryer the main body where the hot air comes out smashed broken 2 shower head whichever direction twisted still water spreading on the floor whilst the shower screen over the bathtub in place 3 toilet seat cover one plug fitting missing exposing a little hole 4 the bottom part of the bathroom door the paint has gone probably due to dampness 5 a hand wash basin chipped at the very front place I was also not happy about the quality of the juice served at the breakfast multivitamin like tasted slightly fermented I mentioned to staff about this and I was apologised and served a fresh one straight from the new box which tasted differently very good Staff at the reception friendly but the appearance not very professional with funky pinkish colour glasses and no smart shirt as for 4 star hotel was quite strange experience   Great location by the Opera close to underground station and very short distance to main tourist attractions Spacious room with a balcony Clean bathroom and linen comfortable beds Very tasty breakfast especially coffee was good but disappointed by quality of multivitamin juice

The room overlooks the ring road and it could be very noisy with the traffic and sirens outside While it didn t bother me it s something to note if you are sensitive about noise   Staff were very friendly and extremely accomodating My room was upgraded to a Junior Suite very spacious and the bed was quite comfortable neither very hard nor soft Breakfast was delicious with an assortment of croissants and rolls fresh fruit and veggies plus cereal eggs sausages and more Air conditioning worked very well This hotel is close to a lot of the museums and parks and quite close to the subway as well

The wifi was rubbish so much so that most of the time my iPad connected to the stronger signal from the adjacent Meridien The room unfortunately looked out onto the Ring which sounds nice but the traffic noise was bad especially as the air con was not working so if you closed the albeit good double glazed window it was a bit stuffy Better to try a hotel on a quieter street and one that has real wifi   Spacious clean room and good breakfast

Everything was perfect   My wife is delighted with the hotel and staff Room was perfect with very good sound isolation so you cannot hear anything from outside She had in the room everything she needed Best regards to manager Harold and all staff and thank you for everything
The shower tub feels a bit unstable  Front desk person called Yigal Alstschuler is an absolute gem Very friendly and knows all the places to go Just wonderful

Although we were really early Mr Schubert at the reception moved heaven and hell to get our room ready We got a small upgrade as well just great The staff is very friendly helpful and flexible Great experience

It was a bit noisy due to the nightclub in the basement of the hotel which we were unaware of prior to arrival   Harald on reception was fantastic and helpful The breakfast was great with lots of choice The hotel location was superb The room was fine great view of the opera house

There should be another light bulb at or close to the mirror in the bathroom to provide a bit more lightness   I like the staffs s attitude as they are ready to help and answer any question i have This is super
hotel is in excellent location the rooms are very classy and the staff is super helpful they upgraded my room to a junior suite just because it was my birthday

The style of the room is minimalist  On the day of checkout I woke up one hour too late for breakfast but the receptionist reopened the restaurant and brought me a breakfast selection platter Location

The room was clean comfortable and very quite excellent breakfast The staff was very kind especially Harald who helped with every question we had The location of the hotel is great in front of the opera house and has all public transportation available in 1 minute walk

Very small matter of the need for handles on the bath to help get in and out Some of us think we are still young but are not as young as we once were   Superb location excellent room and breakfast buffet and quirky friendly people on reception always ready to chat and help

The entrance and lobby look a tad worn out as does the elevator but are not representative for the hotel So don t let yourself be deceived Artwork reproductions based on Pucci is outdated   Large functional room with nice high ceilings Not hyper modern but more than adequate Renovated bathroom Perfect breakfast
Due to bad internet connection we couldn t pay room with credit card and had to go out to withdraw cash from ATM   Awesome location Great helpful staff Good breakfast

European style shower is not as comfortable as American showers but I was in Europe Radiator heated I saw no air conditioner but it was winter I m not sure if they have central air I doubt it   Staff was very helpful and friendly Breakfast was amazing Easy tram access to everywhere on the south side of the ring Lots to see within easy walking distance

We really enjoyed our stay there the location is perfect close to the Opera Museum quartier and Naschmarkt The staff was also really great very helpful it was like they knew what we wanted before we did We definitely would love to come back

the hotel seemed to not be in the best condition the walls were painted poorly and the floor made a lot of noise there was a bad smell in the entire hotel and everything seemed worn out and outdated the interior was cheap and the corners of the windows were moulding the batteries of the remote control were empty and the tv signal broke down several times it was loud and noisy during the night but became even worse in the morning when you heard and felt the rumbling of the 1961 elevator and people shutting the doors  the staff was super nice definitely the best thing about the entire hotel

The blankets were separate and small For a double bed they can be one and big   Everything was perfect especially the recepcionist He is very nice and helpful The location is also very good The hotel and room was very clean If I come again I will definitely choose this place again

Fabulous Hotel Very Friendly Staff The Front Office Manager Harald is very efficient very welcoming Perfect Location When I return to Vienna in the future I will be staying at Das Opernring Hotel Really enjoyed our breakfast with a view of the Vienna State Opera Highly recommend

Location is perfect Just facing Opera and walking distance to all major sites of interest Staff was excellent He explained us everything with patience and even gave us guidlines for walking around and using public transport Room was spacious and clean with straight view to Opera hall Definatelly a must visit again hotel

Shower temperature would fluctuate between hot and freezing   Reception Harald went out of his way to be helpful Showing us all the local attractions and how to get there always greeted us with a cheerful smile Room was large with complementary bottled water coffee and toiletries Perfect location next to the opera house

Wifi was barely working very slow lost connection and many sites were blocked Strange room design inconvenient beds no table for work at all insufficient lighting Hotel is worn out 55 year old elevator worn out doors with mechanical keys very poor selection of food on breakfast   Staff was very nice to me

Starting from welcoming desk ending with nice healthy breakfasts we enjoyed every minute of our stay in this hotel Administrator at check in Herald is a true splendid star in his professionalism he did everything to make our stay most comfortable

Facilities could use a little upgrading  Excellent location to enjoy the cultural sites of Vienna Great breakfast in a relaxing atmosphere Harald Schubert at the reception desk went out of his way to make our stay at Das Opernring and our visit to Vienna a memorable one He helped with reservations directions and valuable tips
Excellent welcoming The staff is very nice and the room was great The location is really next to the city center allowing you to have a small walk in the center even if you do not have a lot of time

The hotel itself looked like it could stand some updates except for the dining room which was nice and had a great view   The location is perfect if you want to be in the mix The breakfast was awesome included champagne The room we stayed in was large with dark laminate hard wood floors not bad and tile and granite in the bath room
Bathroom is old not 4 star standard We can not connect to wifi in our room signal is toooo low Breakfast worst I have ever had for 4 star   Location is perfect close to metro and shops

Amazing location and amazingly helpful staff special mention of the staff member at the reception Mr herald if i can recollect the name correctly He was extremely helpful and made our stay very memorable with inputs on routes and places to visit We had a great stay and our little one enjoyed those candies at the reception
The lobby has not the standard of a four star hotel   Harald at the reception was very kind and professional The view from breakfast room was beautiful

I visited together with my mum and we had really great time at Das Opernring Hotel Great location and great breakfast and not to forget those working in the reception Really friendly and serviceminded A very nice stay in the hotel

the lady working at the reception was the rudest and the least friendly receptionist I ever saw in my life horrible welcoming of the visitors   overall a comfortable and clean hotel with a perfect location
Not relevant  Very friendly staff I met Harold he was excellent person Very professional and caring Location is very good I really would like to go back again

The walls are a bit thin so you can hear next door and outside I was worried I wouldn t be able to fall asleep with the street noise but oddly enough the city quiets down about 9 30p The mornings however I was woken with the breakfast preparations and guests as my room was on the 3rd floor just beside the dining area   The breakfast was above par and the staff is incredible They were so friendly and willing to help direct me to all the places I wanted to go They were accommodating and expressed an obvious desire to provide the best customer service and were even sensitive to my dietary needs as well The location is also prefect for the main attractions of Inner Stradt metro Neuermarkt which was an superb suggestion by the manager
The room was clean and spacious but without aircondition is a little problem Breakfast is great Very helpfull receptionist was there all in all for the money I payed it was perfect

The hotel was absolutely amazing we were upgraded for free to the Junior suite which was the most fantastic room ever The bed was super comfortable slippers and fluffy robes were provided for the stay Most closet space I have ever seen Gorgeous sitting area The bathroom was large and beautiful with great body wash and soap Good hair drier as well We had a balcony and the view was spectacular right in front of the Vienna Opera House The receptionists were absolutely amazing and so helpful We will definitely return to this hotel when in Vienna next time Location was amazing
Nothing to complain about   Lovely friendly and helpful staff It was my partners birthday and they upgraded us to a suite which was a lovely surprise Location excellent

The wifi into the rooms Signal so weak  It s a fantastic hotel in all the ways Personal staff were nice polite and helpful Location is wonderful In front of the hotel is the opera of Wien and you have all the famous building to visit so close the hotel
No public space to meet or relax  Friendly and professional staff who upgraded us when our weitten request for top floor room could not be met Great location for breakfast room

ok well I m not sure if we were given an older room but the hotel standard just didn t warrant the stars it is rated The bedroom felt a little cramped and although the sitting area was nice it didn t match up to the pics advertised If anyone has a major issue with super soft pillows just bring your own to be on the safe side   Great staff very accommodating and the hotel was cleaned thoroughly once a day The location was great within walking distance of Opera nice restaurants nearby and really close to public transport as well as hop on and hop off bus services Most nights afforded a quiet sleep
The suites were perfect view of the Opera House from our balcony The staff were so helpful and solved all of our difficult queries including looking after bike bags
The WiFi was very slow   The location could not have been better The room was spacious and comfortable and the front desk people were friendly and helpful We will definitely return
There wasn t any air conditioning so it was pretty hot  We got upgraded which was great The guy at the desk was lovely and super helpful Great location can easily walk everywhere Nice big bed
stronger wifi  Sweet receptionists beautiful room wonderful breakfast with bubbels too and view on the opera good beds walking distance from almost everything

It sis not have air conditioning Which made it a bit uncomfortable with the hot weather during the day   The proximity to all of the most famous downtown sights was fabulous The staff was very kind and helpful

The staff at the reception were exceptional particularly Mr Schubert They made us feel like Royalty Perfect location as you can walk and get to places of interest in no time We enjoyed having a balcony Fantastic breakfast in a relaxing atmosphere They will see us again

Fantastic location incredibly clean We asked for a second fan as the room was very hot and it was brought up within 5 mins Breakfast is excellent and served until 11am The staff are extremely helpful and organised our opera tickets which was great I would definitely recommend you stay here

The elevator the corridors the bathroom and the staircase are old I would say alltogether this would be rather a 3 than a 4 hotel But the staff breakfast and the location compensate the old building   The location is excellent and the staff was very friendly

Nothing   The gentleman on reception was excellent He spoke every language he knew everyone by name You did not have to give him your room number he knew it He was so helpful With great recommendations for restaurants etc He is a great asset to the hotel He was interested in what you were doing etc Lovely breakfast room Very very central

Because the building is an historic one they have not been able to add air conditioning and it was 90 degrees Fahrenheit while we were there Nevertheless they provided a good electric fan and we managed fine   A lovely location right in the thick of things We were upgraded to a junior suite and it was spacious and well furnished Breakfast was a full buffet with delightful choices The front desk was very helpful

Environment around the hotel is not children friendly Many suspected people especially in the evening time are jumping up and down the streets with looks in their faces and behavior This is not the situation in the street to the hotel but unfortunately the threat is existend in the close proximity to the side streets you have to cross if you are using public transportation or if you want to reach the hotel by foot from a close metro stop a metro stop directly in front of the hotel is there but due to several metro stops close by sometimes it makes sense to use another line and to drop in another station and to walk the rest to the hotel To be more neutral maybe this is the case for all big cities Thin walls You can hear every door closing and opening nearby Even neighborhood chat could be heard although not clearly to understand the conversation still annoying Very tiny old fashioned bathroom I felt not comfortable Had a feeling of disgust To walk in without touching the door is almost not possible No accessories to prepare tea or coffee Rooms need restauration Floor is broken on some parts Very thin pillows More a hotel of between 2 and 3 stars   Breakfast was very good though juice tasted like it was more artificial and not 100 natural Staff was very eager to help and friendly They acknowledged my claims and gave me support to make me feel a little more confident Close proximity to city center If you just look for an accommodation to stay and sleep it is ok Don t expect more in regard of a calm tidy pleasant room The comfort level is between a little bit better than a hostel with the bonus of having relatively privacy see the cons for more detail Price should be around 40 50 euro a day More is a joke

1 Me and my friend got a twin room instead of a double room as requested but maybe they did not have any double rooms available This was not a problem 2 The central heating did not work at all It was a bit cold at night and especially during the first night even if we covered ourselves very well with the blankets The hotel should investigate and repair the heating system 3 Someone tried to enter our room on one of our first nights by pushing it claiming that he had the same room as ours I saw the room carton handed to me by him under the door I calmly replied that he should talk to the reception and I shortly reported the incident to the reception myself I received a call from the receptionist that she noted down the room number wrongly but she gave the man the right key card obviously not to our room This should never have happened 4 There was a problem with my card details on Booking website Unfortunately the woman who replied to my e mails did not express herself in English properly and me and my friend thought our reservation was not valid fixed and we could end up without any accommodation just a few days before arriving in Vienna Afterwards I understood that my nonreturnable reservation was indeed firm and I entered my card details one more time It seems that these details are erased from a reservation after some time and the hotel did not take my money the moment I booked The trouble was that the hotel requested those details a little too late The staff should pay more attention to Booking website regulations and inform the clients in a clearer manner regarding their reservations 5 The daily cleaning did not include sweeping the floor Bits and pieces left over from us were still there at the end of our stay 6 I was initially charged for parking for one of our nights and I reported not using it therefore I did not pay it in the end 7 A tall lamp in the room had its power cord cut and was unusable   1 Me and my friend had a warm welcome on our arrival Thank you very much 2 We received a room on the 6th floor as requested an upper floor but not the last one 3 The room was quite large and it included armchairs a sofa and an extra table 4 We liked that we had a refrigerator and a kettle for making tea which was not included in the presentation 5 Every item seemed new and perfectly clean spotless 6 We had a nice view from the window 7 We had good quality items in the bathroom 8 The twin beds were absolutely comfortable 9 Nice welcoming chocolates on the table 10 A place for storing luggage at the ground floor 11 Sufficient number of electric sockets more than in other places 12 The breakfast was served at convenient hours It was extremely varied and we could eat very well on every occasion but it was not changed from day to day That was not a problem 13 The WiFi Internet worked quite well in the room to my surprise 14 The swimming pool that is free for all the guests 15 During the last night in Vienna on a Monday I needed some help with finding an open pharmacy drugstore at not quite a late hour The receptionist a man different from the woman who welcomed us was helpful and directed me to a 24 hour drugstore in the neighborhood after I had struggled for 30 minutes in vain to find one or at least a shop selling what I needed on foot This must be one of the few downsides of Vienna You cannot expect an ordinary shop to be open at 8 30 PM in the weekdays I find this unbelievable If you come to my country in a big city expect to be able to buy the simplest things close to midnight on weekdays I wonder how do the Viennese cope with a medical emergency at home if by accident they forget to stack themselves with basic medicines 16 The English spoken by the staff was very good 17 The Well if it wasn t for this debacle i would have given the hotel a 5 star rating but unfortunately there are far too many hidden charges which neither Booking nor Mercure Hotel tells the customer about I will warn you that it might be a long read but nevertheless it s important that people hear about it so they won t face the same misfortune as I Upon checking in despite having paid the hotel three months in advance they made me pay twice without neither giving me a form or any kind of paper where there is any type of agreement that i will accept another payment Pay close attention They ll ask you for your card because of a guarantee as they put it what will happen is that they ll charge your card again for the same price you booked the room and an additional 40 euros I unfortunately found out about it when i noticed i couldn t use the ATMs anymore because of this unethical practice When talking to the staffers i was told that this is an authorization and not a payment well what they don t understand is that the funds are frozen since they are reserved and the customers are not able to use them meaning that if you travel on a tight budget well prepare for the worst if you re checking in here It doesn t take them more than a second to take the money but returning it seems like an impossibility at this point I was told by three different staffers that they have released the authorization at three different points in time and they are still frozen I will have to wait at least a week more before I file a report for fraud against this hotel   The room was comfortable and very clean The beds were soft and the furniture made the most use out of the space while not being too intrusive There is also a peaceful lake nearby perfectly suitable for evening strolls and it s not more than a minute s walk there
